prompt: Add a headlight to the explorer. The light should be a narrow beam that illuminates where the explorer is looking at.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1: Add a visible headlight to the small explorer figure located at the bottom center. The headlight should emit a narrow, focused beam of light that projects forward from the explorer, illuminating the path directly ahead and towards the bright opening in the distance.
objects: visible headlight on the explorer figure
narrow, focused beam of light from the headlight
illuminated path directly ahead of the explorer
dark, shadowy areas of the cavern
glowing elements in the cavern walls
